question_text: Was there a bite or sting?
Throat closing sensation or tongue/lip swelling?
Hives (raised itchy welts) or widespread rash?
Vomiting or severe diarrhea with the reaction?
Symptoms started within 2 hours of exposure?
Known severe allergy or prior anaphylaxis?
Location is red, hot, very swollen, or spreading rapidly?
Pus/drainage or open wound at the site?
Severe pain out of proportion to appearance?
Tick bite or possible tick exposure?
Signs of poor circulation near site (cold/pale/numb)?
Recent heat exposure (hot environment, exertion, poor AC)?
Very high fever or felt extremely hot?
Vomiting or cannot keep fluids down?
Stopped sweating or very dry skin?
Dark urine or very little urination (dehydration)?
Heart disease, kidney disease, or significant chronic illness?
Unable to stand or walk safely?
Possible carbon monoxide exposure (gas appliance, running car, generator)?
Trouble breathing or shortness of breath?
Others in the home/building with similar symptoms?
Symptoms improve when you leave the building?
Exposure to a chemical (cleaning product, industrial, pesticide)?
Burns to mouth, throat, or lips?
Do you know what chemical it was?
